ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "seed" TEXT /* Seed value for the team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays home games */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conference */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the conference was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the conference */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the conference's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bid_types" (
  "bid_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bid type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the bid type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bid type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bid_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_bids" (
  "team_bid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team bid */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "bid_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bid type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bid (e.g., accepted, rejected) */,
  "bid_date" TEXT /* Date the bid was received */,
  "bid_description" TEXT /* Additional details about the bid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_bids_bid_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("bid_type_id") REFERENCES bid_types ("bid_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_bids_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team stat */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., wins, losses, points) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., offensive, defensive) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the statistic was recorded */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific game if the statistic is game-specific */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "team_roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "year_in_school" TEXT /* Year in school (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the player (if applicable) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the coach */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the coach */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_coaches" (
  "team_coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team coach entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started working with the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach ended working with the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_coaches_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, player) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Account creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_schedule" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., home, away) */,
  "score_team" INTEGER /* Final score of the team */,
  "score_opponent" INTEGER /* Final score of the opponent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedule_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedule_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
